name: Tuna Sashimi with Orange Glaze
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup Green peppercorns in water, drained
1 pound Fresh tuna, sliced into 1/4-inch-thick slices
2 Oranges; peeled and cut into sections
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove the tip and stem of the tomatoes. Remove seeds and core.
2. Slice the tomatoes into flat pieces. Arrange each slice flat on a plate.
3. Cut the tomatoes lengthwise into 1/4-inch strips, then horizontally into 1/4-inch pieces.
4. Reserve the tomato pieces in the refrigerator, covered.
5. In a small saucepan over medium-high heat, combine orange juice, green peppercorns, and salt. Bring to boil, then reduce until only 2/3 cup remains.
6. The mixture should be thick and syrupy. Transfer liquid to a bowl and cool to room temperature.
7. When cool, beat in oil to make the glaze. If the mixture appears very shiny or seems like it's separating, add a few drops of water or orange juice.
8. To serve, spoon glaze onto plates. Arrange sliced tuna on top. Garnish with orange sections, remaining green peppercorns, and chopped tomato.
